name: Oven Chicken Kiev
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix margarine, chives, and garlic powder.
2. Shape into a rectangle measuring 3 x 2 inches.
3. Cover and freeze for about 30 minutes or until firm.
4. Preheat oven to 425°F.
5. Grease a square pan, 9 x 9 x 2 inches.
6. Remove skin and bones from chicken breasts.
7. Cut chicken breasts in half.
8. Flatten each half to a thickness of 1/4 inch between plastic wrap or waxed paper.
9. Place one piece of the margarine mixture on the center of each chicken breast half.
10. Fold long sides over the margarine.
11. Fold ends up and secure with wooden picks.
12. Mix cornflake crumbs, parsley, and paprika.
13. Dip chicken into buttermilk.
14. Coat chicken evenly with cornflake mixture.
15. Place chicken, seam side down, in the pan.
16. Bake uncovered for about 35 minutes or until juices run clear.
17. Remove wooden picks.
